claim_text: Wheat straw chopped and spread on the soil surface in all tillage treatments; conventional tillage with maize straw return gave the highest wheat yields and soil C sequestration.

value.raw_value_text: Wheat straw was chopped and spread on the soil in all treatments and maize seeded without prior tillage. ... CT was the most robust in terms of crop yields and soil C sequestration.
